suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the procedure rule for agent-browser omission so the guidance and handoff semantics are consistent (either omission requires followedProcedure=false with an explicit deviation, or omission is allowed while still counting as followedProcedure=true when data wiring made browser automation unnecessary).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for misc-peerrow-effective-policy-wip-finish observed that the skill text requires followedProcedure=false when agent-browser is omitted, but the completed handoff documented an intentional omission with followedProcedure=true and no deviations.
